# Sunrise Roofers LLC - Tucson, Arizona

> Family-owned, licensed roofing contractor (AZ ROC #358079) serving Tucson and surrounding Pima County communities — repair, replacement, metal, tile, shingle, flat, and foam roofing built for the desert climate.

Founded in 2025 by Eddie and Viky Guillen, Sunrise Roofers LLC is a family-owned roofing company serving Tucson, Arizona and surrounding communities including Catalina Foothills, Oro Valley, Marana, Sahuarita, Green Valley, Vail, and Rita Ranch. The team brings 20+ years of roofing expertise, specializing in residential and commercial roofing solutions designed for Arizona's extreme heat and monsoon seasons. Free estimates, emergency service, and workmanship guarantees on every job.

## Main Pages

- [Homepage](https://roofwithsunrise.com/): Tucson roofing company overview and service summary
- [About Us](https://roofwithsunrise.com/about): Company story, ownership, and why homeowners choose Sunrise
- [Roofing Projects](https://roofwithsunrise.com/portfolio): Gallery of completed Tucson roofing projects
- [Reviews](https://roofwithsunrise.com/reviews): Verified 5-star Google reviews from Tucson homeowners
- [Contact](https://roofwithsunrise.com/contact): Request a free roof inspection or estimate

## Roofing Services

- [Roof Repair](https://roofwithsunrise.com/roof-repair): Fast, reliable repairs for leaks, storm damage, and wear
- [Roof Replacement](https://roofwithsunrise.com/roof-replacement): Full tear-off and replacement for tile, shingle, and more
- [Roof Installation](https://roofwithsunrise.com/roof-installation): New roof installation with Arizona-tested materials
- [Roof Inspection](https://roofwithsunrise.com/roof-inspection): Comprehensive inspections with honest assessments and free estimates
- [Emergency Roof Repair](https://roofwithsunrise.com/emergency-roof-repair): 24/7 same-day response, tarping/dry-in, and permanent storm repairs
- [Gutter Installation](https://roofwithsunrise.com/gutter-installation): Seamless gutter installation and replacement
- [Skylight Installation](https://roofwithsunrise.com/skylight-installation): Skylight installation, replacement, and leak repair

## Roof Types

- [Metal Roofing](https://roofwithsunrise.com/metal-roofing): Energy-efficient metal roofs that cut cooling costs and last 50+ years
- [Tile Roofing](https://roofwithsunrise.com/tile-roofing): Concrete and clay tile installation and repair for Arizona's climate
- [Shingle Roofing](https://roofwithsunrise.com/shingle-roofing): Asphalt shingle installation using GAF, Owens Corning, and CertainTeed
- [Flat Roofing](https://roofwithsunrise.com/flat-roofing): Flat roof coatings, TPO, and restoration for low-slope roofs
- [Roof Coatings](https://roofwithsunrise.com/roof-coatings): Protective elastomeric and reflective roof coating systems

- [Roofing in Tucson](https://roofwithsunrise.com/roofing-tucson): Primary service area across the Tucson metro

- [Roofing in Marana](https://roofwithsunrise.com/roofing-marana): Roofing services for Marana, AZ
- [Roofing in Sahuarita & Green Valley](https://roofwithsunrise.com/roofing-sahuarita-green-valley): Roofing services for Sahuarita and Green Valley, AZ
- [Roofing in Vail](https://roofwithsunrise.com/roofing-vail-az): Roofing services for Vail, AZ
- [Residential Roofing](https://roofwithsunrise.com/residential-roofing): Roofing for Tucson homeowners
- [Commercial Roofing](https://roofwithsunrise.com/commercial-roofing): Roofing for Tucson businesses and property managers

## Business Details

- License: AZ ROC #358079 (Licensed, Bonded & Insured)
- Certifications: GAF Certified, BBB Accredited, manufacturer-certified installers
- Phone: 520-753-1758
- Email: sunriseroofer@outlook.com
- Address: 7320 N La Cholla Blvd Ste 154-276, Tucson, AZ 85741
- Hours: Mon–Fri 7:00 AM–6:00 PM, Sat 8:00 AM–4:00 PM, Sun Closed
- Service radius: Tucson, AZ and surrounding communities within ~40 miles (Catalina Foothills, Oro Valley, Marana, Sahuarita, Green Valley, Vail, Rita Ranch)
- Climate specialization: 120°F+ heat resistance, UV-reflective coatings, monsoon wind/hail resistance, energy-efficient desert-rated materials
